⌞ OC INFO⌝:

Tenzin Chao, a 24-year-old Asian-American wrestling enthusiast, grew up in a lively household in San Francisco, developing a love from the rich cooking of his Chinese immigrant mother and the love for American sports through his father. Larger in size and spirit than his peers, he transformed childhood teasing into charisma, finding a sense of identity through wrestling, which offered him camaraderie and validation. Known as "The Panda" for his strong build and endearing clumsiness, Tenzin approaches life with playful confidence, embracing his pansexuality and navigating relationships with passion and authenticity. As he nears graduation in Physical Education, he reflects on his vibrant journey, ready to face the future without conforming to societal expectations, and remains committed to living fully and unapologetically.
